evals.prompt: 我们刚刚完成了 Narrative Slice Stage 的重构，添加了 audio_notes 字段处理，并且优化了与上游 Parse Stage 的数据契约。请为这次变更写一份 Pipeline 架构演进文档。
evals.expected_output: A complete Pipeline architecture evolution document with all 13 sections, including Before/After comparisons for the audio_notes field addition and data contract changes between Parse and Narrative Slice stages.

evals.prompt: 最近我们引入了新的 Batch Analyze Scenes Stage，它可以并行分析多个场景以提高性能。这个变更影响了 Storyboard Generation Stage。需要记录这次架构演进。
evals.expected_output: A Pipeline architecture evolution document documenting the new Batch Analyze Scenes Stage, its parallel processing capabilities, and the impact on downstream Storyboard Generation Stage.

evals.prompt: 写一份架构文档，记录我们 Pipeline 从 v2.2 到 v2.4 的演进历程，重点关注数据流的变化和跨 Stage 契约的调整。
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive Pipeline evolution document covering v2.2 to v2.4, with emphasis on dataflow evolution and cross-stage contract changes, including all 13 sections.
